projects.title: Remi — Collaborative Memory Platform
projects.description: Co-founded and designed a collaborative memory-sharing platform. Led product definition, built Figma prototypes, and evaluated scalable architecture and authentication workflows.
projects.skills: React, Figma, Product Design, System Architecture

projects.title: RF & I2C State Machine
projects.description: Designed and debugged an Arduino-based RF communication system using RFM69HCW transceivers and implemented a finite-state machine managing communication and synchronized I2C device coordination.
projects.skills: C++, Arduino, RFM69HCW, I2C, Embedded Systems

projects.title: RC Car Using Audio Commands
projects.description: Developed a wireless embedded control system enabling voice-command operation using ESP32 audio processing and RF communication.
projects.skills: C++, Python, Arduino, ESP32, RF Communication, SPI
